應該係 E > F > B > A > D > C
果度有3 group野 A B係Ketone
C D係ester E F係amide
v(ester) > v(ketone) > v(amide)
=> (E, F) > (A, B) > (C, D)
個bond愈stable wavenumber同frequency愈大
compare E & F, E attached to more electron withdrawing phenyl group (electron deficient)
=>E > F
跟住compare A & B, 5 membered ring vs 6 membered ring, 6 membered ring more stable
=> B > A
最後compare C & D, Normal amide vs stabilised amide
=> D > C
所以加埋 E > F > B > A > D > C
